package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_binds_directly_into_model: Handlers that bind request bodies directly into GORM or persistence structs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule041NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule041NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule041NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario041Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule041NegativeService, input Rule041NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
